summary: The diff shows modifications to Portfolio.tsx with partial implementation of image path fixes and error logging, but evidence is incomplete due to truncation. Several requirements lack clear implementation evidence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Audit and verify that all 120 gallery image files physically exist in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory with correct filenames and valid image file formats
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence of file system audit or verification of 120 images. Portfolio.tsx only references 30 residential, 3 commercial, and 3 before-after images (36 total), not the required 120 images.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the Portfolio component image path construction to correctly reference all 120 gallery images using absolute path pattern '/assets/generated/{category}-{number}.png' with numbers 1-40 for each category
missing_requirements.reason: Portfolio.tsx only implements paths for 36 images total, not 120. Residential uses sparse numbers [1-15, 21-35], commercial uses [1-3], before-after uses [1-3]. Required range is 1-40 for each of the three categories (120 total).

missing_requirements.requirement: Verify the Vite/build configuration correctly serves static assets from the frontend/public directory
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence of Vite configuration changes or verification in the diff. No modifications to vite.config.ts or build configuration files are shown.

missing_requirements.requirement: Regenerate any missing, corrupted, or improperly formatted gallery images among the 120 total images, ensuring all images are valid PNG files with appropriate dimensions
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence of image regeneration, creation, or validation. No image files added to the repository or scripts to generate images.

hallucinated_features.description: Portfolio.tsx uses image paths with '.dim_1200x800.png' suffix instead of plain '.png' format
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest specifies PNG format and path pattern '/assets/generated/{category}-{number}.png' without dimension suffixes. The implemented paths use '/assets/generated/residential-${num}.dim_1200x800.png' which does not match the required pattern.

hallucinated_features.description: Portfolio component implements only 36 images instead of 120, with sparse numbering for residential category
hallucinated_features.reason: Implementation uses residentialImageNumbers array with selective numbers [1-15, 21-35] instead of continuous 1-40 range. Commercial and before-after categories only have 3 images each instead of 40.
